name: Cafe 1676 Vienna

identity.name: Cafe 1676
identity.notes: Official-linked Toast confirms the exact McLean/Tysons address at 1676 International Drive, McLean, VA 22102; frozen locationId vienna-va is a metro-area bucket, not the literal municipality. No other location was merged.
